## Scope

- Exact host, keyboard model, layout, and connection path:
- User-visible change:

## Verification

- [ ] Swift tests pass.
- [ ] Windows tests pass when shared protocol or Windows code changes.
- [ ] Shell, PowerShell, YAML, and firmware checks pass when relevant.
- [ ] Exact-hardware observations are recorded, or the profile remains testing.
- [ ] The applicable checklist in `docs/VERIFIED_PATHS.md` is complete before any status is changed to verified.

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No VIA backup, official recovery image, full-flash dump, local Hook configuration, absolute personal path, secret, certificate, or notarization credential is included.
- [ ] App replacement, Hook changes, DFU entry, and firmware writes remain separate human approvals.
- [ ] Existing licenses, third-party notices, firmware source patches, and build records are preserved.
